title: Pure Pale Saudi Arabian Apricot Stir Fry
description: A sweet and light Saudi Arabian dish featuring apricot jam, stir fried to perfection and served in a ti leaf wrap, this recipe is FODMAP friendly and perfect for a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: apricot jam
ingredients.notes: make sure it is FODMAP friendly

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the apricot jam, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Prepare the ti leaves by washing and drying them.
Spoon the chicken and apricot mixture onto the center of each ti leaf.
Fold the ti leaves to form a wrap and serve immediately.
Garnish with a squeeze of lemon juice.
